programme.title: Hoarders S13
programme.desc: A reality-TV show that features compulsive hoarders--people who are addicted to filling their homes with objects--and how that spills out into their lives.

programme.title: Films & Stars 2026/27
programme.desc: Films and Stars cover the hottest events from the big screen every week.

programme.title: The Cube S11
programme.desc: Contestants must battle to win a top prize of 250,000 pounds and each of them must complete apparently simple tasks while under the spotlight in a large perspex cube. Each task is worth a prize and the contestants will have to work hard to stay in the game.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off S8
programme.desc: The junior version of this global phenomenon returns, hosted by BAFTA-winning comedian Harry Hill. Pastry chef and food writer Ravneet Gill and Bake Off alumnus Liam Charles return to judge the efforts of more budding bakers. It's a mouth-watering journey, as 16 of the country's best young bakers compete. A joyful way of getting children passionate about food.

programme.title: Croc Watch and Hippo Watch with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: With his trademark adventure-style approach, Steve takes us to South Africa's Ndumo Game Reserve to explore the dangerous world of hippos and crocs. Remarkable moments include the tagging of a formidable three-meter-long crocodile the unique dietary habits of hippos (and how they cause conflict with local farmers) and how vulnerable these creatures are to climate change.

programme.title: Lingo UK S2
programme.desc: In this game show, hosted by the iconic RuPaul, the simplest of words could be worth thousands of dollars. Lingo is the fast paced word-play game that keeps on innovating for new audiences, with its mix of skill, tension, humour and the chance to win big cash prizes. Teams are pitted against each other in a battle to fill in the blanks and find words.

programme.title: Ollie And Friends S6
programme.desc: The Triangle Man is in such a rush that he can't take the time to fix things along the way. What happens when the imp steals masterpiece from the museum? Will Ollie and the gang be able to stop him? Will The Triangle Man learn to stop hurrying and do what it needs to be done? The squares can't keep their hands to themselves. They keep going to places they shouldn't and touching other people's things without asking their permission. Things go wrong when they decide to take the aliens' spaceship.

programme.title: Go Jetters: Sr3
programme.desc: Go Jetters go bigger as our plucky international heroes Xuli, Kyan, Lars and Foz, together with their disco-grooving mentor Ubercorn, discover lots more about our world. And we learn much more about each of the Go Jetters too. Travelling from the top of the planet to the very bottom, their action-packed adventures take them to truly incredible places. And there's a good chance Grandmaster Glitch has got there first to cause his usual chaos!

programme.title: 123 Number Squad S1
programme.desc: Aamil wants to help Lux upgrade his peaceful oasis as he feels it is only a 4 out of 10 presently. With the Number Squad's help, Aamil finds the best ways to improve its score to a perfect 10. Shelly and Captain Redbeard found the Golden Conch at the same time and are squabbling over who gets to keep it. The squad suggests settling the score with a little competition.

programme.title: Moka's Fabulous Adventures
programme.desc: Moka, the King of the Savannah's son, a naive and reckless little crocodile, leaves home one day to go explore his vast kingdom. Cherry, a brave rhinoceros from the Royal Guard is sent along to insure his protection. But much to her despair, Moka's insatiable curiosity and impulsive behavior are constantly getting them into trouble!

programme.title: Pokemon Horizons: The Series
programme.desc: The series stars two new protagonists, Liko and Roy, who team up with the Rising Volt Tacklers, a group of adventurers that explore the Pokmon world and visit various regions. As they do, they are pursued by the Explorers, a mysterious organization seeking Liko's pendant for unknown reasons.

programme.title: On The Red Dot
programme.desc: In this first episode, Joey leaves her tech career to save her dad's roast meat business, while Megan fights to revive her mother's struggling lighting shop with bold new ideas and a fresh perspective.

programme.title: Talking Point
programme.desc: With a fresh approach to tackling the issues of the day, Talking Point investigates a current issue or event, offering different perspectives to local stories and reveals how it all affects you.

programme.title: Kin
programme.desc: James unexpectedly turns up at a Shelley family meeting and humiliates Eunice. Handsome's old school friends drop by at Boss Lady and he goes overboard trying to impress them. Nina tries her hand at streaming and is mocked by Nathan.

programme.title: Clean it, Fix it – Series 4
programme.desc: Master builder and household favourite Tommy Walsh, expert pro cleaner Maxine Dwyer and creative carpenter Asher Edwards help people across the UK to renovate and improve their homes. The team has two days to transform a living space in desperate need of some love. Series 4 sees enterprising co-presenter Mark Wright and a new expert de-clutterer join in the challenge of making tired homes relievable – without breaking the bank.

programme.title: The Chefs' Line - Series 1
programme.desc: Every top restaurant has a line of chefs leading to the top, from the Commis chef to the Head chef. This celebratory cooking competition pitches at-home cooking enthusiasts against professionals, starting at the bottom and working their way up. Can they beat their way to the top of The Chef's Line?

programme.desc: Bradley Walsh and his criminally clever Chaser are back for yet another battle of the brains - can our contestants beat the Chaser, or will it be just another day at the office?

programme.title: Big Adventures: Into Thailand With Sue Perkins
programme.desc: Sue Perkins is set to get lost in Thailand and promises to offer a unique blend of adventure, culture, and humour. The series follows Sue as she embarks on an extraordinary journey across three regions of Thailand, pushing her limits and diving deep into the country's rich culture.

programme.title: Code of Silence
programme.desc: When the police ask Deaf catering worker Alison to lip-read criminals' conversations, she is plunged into a high-stakes new world. Her assessment of the gang's clandestine meetings quickly becomes key to unlocking the investigation. But as she finds herself increasingly drawn to one of the suspects, Alison's feelings about the case become complicated.

programme.title: Thayamma Yenna Kaapaathuu!
programme.desc: After a peaceful retreat at the Grizzly Igloo, Karthick makes his way down to the charming town of Ohrid — a beloved gem in the Balkans. Known for its rich history and scenic beauty, Ohrid is also famous for its delicious trout, freshly caught from the crystal-clear lake. Karthick dives in to discover what makes this lakeside town so special — and so tasty.

programme.title: Thayamma Yenna Kaapaathuu!
programme.desc: In this intriguing episode, we travel to the hauntingly named Bay of Bones on Lake Ohrid. Why such a terrifying name? Back in the 1990s, archaeologists began excavations in this region and uncovered a staggering number of bones Karthik finds out why?

programme.title: Thayamma Yenna Kaapaathuu!
programme.desc: Crossing into Albania, Karthick is greeted by rugged mountains, turquoise beaches, and a culture bursting with warmth and resilience. From savoring slow-cooked meats to stumbling upon age-old bunkers and lively street cafes, Albania quickly proves it's more than just a hidden gem — it's an unforgettable chapter in his Balkan journey.

programme.title: Thayamma Yenna Kaapaathuu!
programme.desc: Albania hits Karthick with a history lesson and a plot twist — from the once-dreaded-now-hipster Pyramid of Tirana to cooling off with a Red Bull ice cream (yes, that's a thing). He gets schooled in Albanian hospitality, nearly adopts a stray dog, and ends up at a traditional restaurant started by an actor-director who clearly knows drama and dumplings. Albania's past may be heavy, but Karthick's experience is anything but!

Their son, Maran, meets a group of lovable misfits at school while their rebellious daughter, Mangai, feels alienated being the only human in the family. Join this oddball family in Ayalaan - Out of this World on a whimsical journey of understanding the complex beings that are humans!
